inline_comments.message: should be 2.3.0 introduced part of this change

According to https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/, changes which have not released yet are added in "Unreleased" section.
I think those should be moved to new version 2.3.0 section at release time when officially docker image are built.
What do you think?

Changelog entry is not indicative of component release (release version are documented separately under RTD; date logged here basically indicates when version first is introduced)

Adding "unreleased" section could cause confusion in the long run - as there are no separate release specific container builds in ONAP (every snapshot technically can be release candidate) and when subsequent version are released - it will include all prior commits by default

Thanks Vijay, I understand.

Updated Changelog.md section to 2.3.0.
I presumed the date format is dd/mm/yyyy, correct me if I'm wrong.
